EXP_METADATA.experimental_design: factorial split-plot design with tillage assigned to the main plots and cropping systems to the sub-plots
EXP_METADATA.experimental_factor_comb: maize (Zea mays L.) monoculture, dry bean (Phaseolus vulgaris L.) monoculture, maize-dry bean rotation, and maize-dry bean intercropping at Melkassa
